RETURN MERCHANDISE AUTHORIZATION
==================================

Request Date:     2026-03-03
Original Order:   ORD-2026-11847
Customer:         Sunrise Home & Garden LLC

RETURN REASON: Defective Product — Items arrived with manufacturing defects

ITEMS TO RETURN:

| Line | SKU         | Description                        | Qty  | Unit Cost  | Line Total  |

|  1   | WF-HM-2031  | Silicone Kitchen Utensil Set 8pc   |   12 |   $11.49   |    $137.88  |
|  2   | WF-BT-5001  | Natural Lip Balm Variety 6pk       |   25 |    $3.99   |     $99.75  |
+------+-------------+------------------------------------+------+------------+-------------+
                                                    Return Total:     $237.63

CONDITION OF ITEMS:
  Line 1: Spatula handles cracked on 12 of 48 sets (25% defect rate)
          Photos attached: IMG_4521.jpg, IMG_4522.jpg
  Line 2: Labeling error — ingredient list missing allergen warnings
          All 25 units affected — cannot be resold

  [ ] Exchange for different product

  this SKU until the issue is resolved.
